title: Information Retrieval Process Using Signature Files
description: A flowchart illustrating the two main phases of using signature files: (1) Indexing documents by creating their signatures and storing them in a file, and (2) Query processing by filtering the signature file to find potential matches before a final detailed check.
relationships: Signatures are stored in a signature file
Query is converted to a query signature
Query signature filters the signature file
Candidate documents undergo a detailed check for final results
